productDisplayName: Nike Unisex China Swsh Ct White Socks
description: It's comfort unparalleled once you slip into these white socks from nike. Made of 77% cotton, 22% nylon  and 1% spandex, these socks are perfect for Sports and casual outings.Made of cotton, nylon and spandex, it provides all-day comfort, stretch and moisture wicking propertiesThe arch support offers a secure, stable FitGreater shock absorption propertiesBrand name woven on the rolled down cuffsRib knit cuff with roomy toe area for superior comfort and durabilitySock careMachine wash cold in 30 degree water Use non-chlorine bleachTumble dry lowDo not iron or dry clean
